title: Landtia nervosa

The classification of Landtia nervosa is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Landtia, species L. nervosa. benefits: Landtia nervosa, a rare and unique plant, has been found to possess several potential health benefits.
